title: OMNIX ATF Open Receipt Schema
description: Open, machine-readable JSON Schema for all ATF receipt types. Enables semantic portability of ATF governance artifacts — any system can verify and interpret ATF receipts without the OMNIX runtime. Version 1.0.0 — ADR-172 — OMNIX QUANTUM LTD — May 2026.

canonical_json_algorithm.description: Algorithm for computing content_hash. ATF-INV-006 / conformance_vectors.json.
steps: 1. Exclude fields: content_hash, pqc_signature, pqc_algorithm, pqc_signature_a, pqc_signature_b, sac_content_hash, spv_hash
4. SHA-256 hex digest of the UTF-8 bytes
canonical_json_algorithm.pqc_signature_message: PQC signatures are computed over content_hash.encode('utf-8') — the HEX STRING of the SHA-256 digest, NOT the raw digest bytes.

hex64.description: SHA-256 hex digest (64 lowercase hex characters)

base64_string.description: Base64-encoded binary data (standard encoding, may include padding)

pqc_algorithm_name.description: Post-quantum or classical signing algorithm identifier

atf_core_term.description: One of the 8 ATF Core Terms (ADR-171 §2.2)

task_scope.description: Authorization scope dict — what the delegate is authorized to do. Semantics are runtime-defined; fields depend on domain and deployment.

DR.title: Delegation Receipt (DR)
DR.description: Cryptographic proof of agent-to-agent authority delegation. ADR-156. Every DR is PQC-signed by the delegator's ML-DSA-65 key. ATF-INV-001 (authority never expands), ATF-INV-002 (every receipt is PQC-signed), ATF-INV-005 (immutable once issued).

delegation_id.description: Unique receipt identifier. Format: ATFDR-{16 uppercase hex}.

delegator_id.description: AID or human operator ID of the delegating party.

task_scope.description: Authorization scope granted to the delegate.

authority_budget_delegator.description: Authority budget held by the delegator at issuance time.

authority_budget_granted.description: Authority budget granted to the delegate. MUST be ≤ authority_budget_delegator (ATF-INV-001).

parent_delegation_id.description: ID of the DR that granted the delegator its authority. Null if issued from human root.

chain_root_id.description: ID of the originating DR in the delegation chain (human root). Enables full lineage reconstruction.

delegation_depth.description: Depth in the delegation chain. 0 = human root, 1 = first agent, N = Nth sub-agent.

delegator_public_key.description: ML-DSA-65 public key of the delegator (base64). Embedded for self-contained verification — no platform access needed.

content_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON of all fields except signature fields. Detects tampering.

pqc_signature.description: ML-DSA-65 signature over content_hash.encode('utf-8') by delegator_public_key.

expires_at.description: DR expiry timestamp (UTC). Null = no expiry.

invariants.ATF-INV-002: pqc_signature MUST be present and valid for ATF-RGC-Compliant runtimes
invariants.ATF-INV-005: content_hash is immutable once issued; any field change invalidates it

TAR.title: Temporal Admissibility Record (TAR)
TAR.description: Cryptographic proof that a DR was ACTIVE at the exact nanosecond of an agent execution event. ADR-157. Answers: 'Was this agent's authority still valid at the EXACT nanosecond it took the action?' TAR-INV-001: issued BEFORE execution completes.

tar_id.description: Unique TAR identifier. Format: ATFTAR-{16 uppercase hex}.

delegation_id.description: ID of the DR authorizing the agent action.

execution_ns.description: Nanosecond Unix timestamp of the execution event.

execution_ts.description: ISO UTC timestamp of execution (TAR-INV-002: bound by PQC signature).

dr_status_at_admission.description: Status of the DR at the moment of TAR admission evaluation.

authority_budget.description: Authority budget of the DR at admission time.

task_action.description: Description of the action being admitted.

admission_status.description: Result of the temporal admissibility check.

rejection_reason.description: Reason for rejection if admission_status = REJECTED.

pqc_signature.description: ML-DSA-65 signature over content_hash.encode('utf-8'). TAR-INV-002: timestamp is bound by this signature.

issued_at.description: TAR issuance timestamp. MUST precede execution completion (TAR-INV-001).

TAR.note_on_verification: TAR does not embed the issuer public key. Use --public-key flag in omnix_atf_verify.py for PQC signature verification.

invariants.TAR-INV-001: TAR issued_at MUST precede execution completion
invariants.TAR-INV-002: execution_ts is cryptographically bound by pqc_signature
invariants.TAR-INV-003: Expired DRs produce TAR with admission_status=REJECTED
invariants.TAR-INV-006: DR lifetime at admission cannot exceed TAR_MAX_DR_LIFETIME_SECONDS (compiled constant, 86400s)

DTR.title: Domain Translation Receipt (DTR)
DTR.description: Authority translation between governance domains. ADR-158. Proves that a DR from domain A was validly translated to domain B with mandatory authority discount. CDTP-INV-001: translated_budget ≤ source_budget × (1 - discount).

dtr_id.description: Unique DTR identifier. Format: ATFDTR-{16 uppercase hex}.

source_delegation_id.description: ID of the source DR being translated.

source_authority_budget.description: Authority budget in the source DR.

translated_budget.description: Translated authority budget. MUST be ≤ source_authority_budget × (1 - translation_discount) (CDTP-INV-001).

translation_discount.description: Fractional discount applied (e.g. 0.20 = 20%). Always > 0 to enforce authority reduction.

translation_policy.description: Identifier of the translation policy applied.

invariants.CDTP-INV-002: DTR is PQC-signed by the issuing system
invariants.CDTP-INV-003: DTR embeds source_delegation_id for chain traceability
invariants.CDTP-INV-004: DTR is domain-scoped — invalid outside target_domain

RCR.title: Runtime Continuity Record (RCR)
RCR.description: Continuous authority health snapshot for long-running agent executions. ADR-159. CES (Continuity Eligibility Score) drives automatic escalation. RGC-INV-005: all RCRs PQC-signed and immutable.

tar_id.description: ID of the TAR that admitted this agent. RGC-INV-001: every RCR anchored to a valid TAR.

execution_ns.description: Nanosecond Unix timestamp of this continuity snapshot.

ces_score.description: Continuity Eligibility Score. Formula (RGC-INV-002): T×0.30 + B×0.30 + D×0.20 + I×0.20

ces_temporal.description: T-component: time remaining on DR / total DR lifetime × 100

predecessor_rcr_id.description: Previous RCR in the continuity chain. RGC-INV-006: chain is acyclic.

fragmentation_score.description: AFG aggregate budget utilization at chain_root_id level. RGC-INV-004: never exceeds 0.95.

invariants.RGC-INV-001: Every RCR anchored to a valid TAR
invariants.RGC-INV-002: CES = T×0.30 + B×0.30 + D×0.20 + I×0.20 — non-negotiable formula
invariants.RGC-INV-003: HALT terminates execution and revokes in-flight sub-tasks
invariants.RGC-INV-006: Continuity chain is acyclic (monotonically advancing execution_ns)

SAC.title: Semantic Alignment Certificate (SAC)
SAC.description: Bilateral PQC-signed semantic alignment map between two runtimes. Layer 4 of the ATF interoperability stack. ADR-171. Enables ATF-SGIP-Aligned compliance designation. SGIP-INV-004: sac_content_hash covers both SPV hashes at issuance.

runtime_a.description: Runtime A identity and SPV reference at SAC issuance (SGIP-INV-004).

runtime_b.description: Runtime B identity and SPV reference at SAC issuance (SGIP-INV-004).

semantic_alignment_map.description: Per-term alignment status for all 8 ATF Core Terms. SGIP-INV-002: all 8 terms MUST be present.

status.description: ALIGNED: both runtimes hold same definition. ACKNOWLEDGED_DIVERGENCE: different but bilaterally reviewed. UNRESOLVED: undefined or not signed — SGIP-INV-003 applies.

divergence_resolution.description: Required when status=ACKNOWLEDGED_DIVERGENCE. MORE_RESTRICTIVE is the safe default.

divergence_note.description: Human-readable description of the semantic difference.

unresolved_terms.description: Terms with UNRESOLVED status. SGIP-INV-003: these default to more restrictive interpretation.

sac_content_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON of {parties, semantic_alignment_map}. SGIP-INV-004.

pqc_signature_a.description: ML-DSA-65 signature by runtime_a over sac_content_hash.

pqc_signature_b.description: ML-DSA-65 signature by runtime_b over sac_content_hash.

invariants.SGIP-INV-001: STR entries referenced by SPVs are immutable
invariants.SGIP-INV-002: Both SPVs must cover all 8 ATF Core Terms
invariants.SGIP-INV-003: UNRESOLVED terms default to more restrictive interpretation; if neither has definition, operation is BLOCKED
invariants.SGIP-INV-004: sac_content_hash covers both spv_hash values at issuance time — SPV updates do not retroactively modify the SAC

STR.title: Semantic Term Registry Entry (STR)
STR.description: Formal operational definition of one ATF Core Term. Append-only — immutable once signed (SGIP-INV-001). ADR-171 §2.

formal_statement.description: Authoritative operational definition of the term.

regulatory_anchors.description: Regulatory frameworks this definition is anchored to (e.g. 'EU-AI-ACT-ART-14').

supersedes_id.description: str_entry_id of the entry this supersedes. Previous entry remains independently verifiable (SGIP-INV-001).

SPV.title: Semantic Policy Vector (SPV)
SPV.description: Point-in-time snapshot of a runtime's STR entries for all 8 core terms. The spv_hash is the semantic fingerprint of the runtime. ADR-171 §3.

atf_core_term_set.description: One entry per ATF Core Term. Complete SPV requires all 8.

extended_terms.description: Additional runtime-specific terms beyond the core set.

spv_hash.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON of atf_core_term_set. Two runtimes with identical spv_hash are semantically equivalent.
